mapper.sql: f.*, s.supervisor_name, s.phone AS supervisor_phone, p.province_name, c.city_name, l.level_name, g.member_name

FROM supervisor_feedback f LEFT JOIN supervisor s ON f.supervisor_id = s.id LEFT JOIN grid_province p ON f.province_id = p.id LEFT JOIN grid_city c ON f.city_id = c.id LEFT JOIN aqi_level l ON f.estimated_level = l.id LEFT JOIN grid_member g ON f.grid_member_id = g.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supervisor_feedback (supervisor_id, province_id, city_id, grid_address, estimated_level, feedback_desc, feedback_images, status) VALUES (#{supervisorId}, #{provinceId}, #{cityId}, #{gridAddress}, #{estimatedLevel}, #{feedbackDesc}, #{feedbackImages}, 0)
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE f.grid_member_id = #{gridMemberId} AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.assign_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE supervisor_feedback SET confirm_aqi = #{confirmAqi}, confirm_level = #{confirmLevel}, so2_value = #{so2}, co_value = #{co}, pm25_value = #{pm25}, status = 2, confirm_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
